summary: crm-cleanup runx skill published to the live registry (mamonisme/crm-cleanup@sha-514384e18210), green local + hosted harness (4 cases incl. a read-only stop-case), and proven in one sealed post-publish dogfood run that reads a real CRM connector export at runtime, reconciles a transcript, and seals a before/after write_result. Read-only preview: refuses mutate/append/advance via the refuse agent runner.

input.transcript: Customer has gone quiet, not returning emails, and said they are considering not renewing and might be moving away to a cheaper tool. Clearly at risk.

dogfood.command: runx skill mamonisme/crm-cleanup@sha-514384e18210 --registry https://api.runx.ai -i data_source_ref=local://runx-crm/cleanup-dev -i crm_export_ref=/root/workspace/runx/skills/crm-cleanup/fixtures/crm-records.json -i case_id=globex-002 -i transcript='Customer has gone quiet, not returning emails, and said they are considering not renewing and might be moving away to a cheaper tool. Clearly at risk.' --json --approve-operator-context <digest> --receipts /tmp/dogfood-receipts
dogfood.verify_verdict: sealed (post-publish dogfood run, runx.skill_run.v1 envelope, registry_source=remote https://api.runx.ai, trust_state=trusted). Distinct from the harness fixture seals.

observations.detail: runx --version = runx-cli 0.7.1 (meets acceptance gate >= 0.6.14); publish/install/dogfood/verify all run with this binary.
Post-publish dogfood read a REAL connector export at runtime (crm_export_ref path opened by the skill, not a hand-pasted fixture arg). source_read=3 records; source_record_id=globex-002.

Transcript 'considering not renewing / moving away' -> field_update account_status:at_risk, value traced to source_ref globex-002 (basis: transcript at-risk language). Stays within crm_schema allowlist.

Mock CRM transport executed the decision: write_result{before:{account_status:active}, after:{account_status:at_risk}, changed:true}, applied_fields=[account_status], sealed_at set. Not an inert proposal object.
Harness case crm-cleanup-noop-sealed: transcript with no actionable cue -> no field_updates, write_result.changed=false. Proves the no-op branch seals without executing a write.

Local harness status: passed; 4 cases: crm-cleanup-reconcile-sealed (sealed), crm-cleanup-renewal-recover-sealed (sealed), crm-cleanup-noop-sealed (sealed), crm-cleanup-readonly-stop (needs_agent). Hosted registry harness green after publish.

Post-publish dogfood receipt id=sha256:7a43a694c08f0ffbc30734becd5f000879a3ad21a127344714ef033aa05216f8 (runx.skill_run.v1, run_id run_cleanup_08ee35909756, registry_source remote https://api.runx.ai). This is the recorded receipt_ref, not a harness fixture seal.

Same package version (sha-514384e18210) and source revision (c6c3a61b6d16feb8e90dc8dbdd73e61da1bad2b1) across registry package, PR head, source_url, x_yaml, skill_md, evidence_json, verification_json, receipt_ref, and report. publisher owner=mamonisme.
